title: DATALAND
author: @RefikAnadol
description: A museum of AI arts, exploring how artificial intelligence and human creativity intersect, featuring AI data paintings using real-time data.

title: LA on the Move
author: Data Vandals
description: An immersive experience using larger-than-life graphics, 3D maps, and animal sounds to bring wildlife and humans together at Union Station.

title: LA Metro Interactive Map
author: Unknown
description: A navigation app that simplifies traveling by LA Metro transit in Los Angeles, featuring interactive maps and route planning.

title: BuildLA Appointment System
author: City of Los Angeles
description: A system for scheduling appointments and accessing city services, using the Angeleno Account for secure and easy access.

title: Discover LA
author: Unknown
description: The official guide to Los Angeles, featuring an app for urban exploration and discovery.

title: Omdena's Los Angeles Local Chapter
author: Omdena
description: A project building open datasets and visualizations to improve access to local data in Los Angeles, completed in just 4 weeks.

title: County of Los Angeles Open Data
author: County of Los Angeles
description: A portal providing access to open data, enabling filtering, visualization, and app development.

title: LIVE FROM LA
author: Processing Foundation
description: A fellowship project building a creative technology project, featuring a VR music video and other immersive experiences.

title: Vibe Coding Project
author: Unknown
description: A project exploring the practice of building software by conversing with AI, featuring a 2-day boot camp and successful product development.

title: Art + Tech Lab
author: LACMA
description: A lab supporting experiments in design, creative entrepreneurship, and art, featuring a request for proposals and innovative projects.

title: LA Creative Technologies
author: Josh Weiss
description: A company delivering technology solutions for creative and passion-driven businesses, featuring IT services and innovative projects.
